title: croton klotzschianus
intro: Croton klotzschianus, also known as the "Croton" or "Fever Pepper", is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Croton klotzschianus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
